name: python3-retry
title: python3-retry
description:
easy to use retry decorator
Decorator (or function) to retry failing code featuring:
.
- No external dependency (stdlib only)
- Preserve function signatures (pip install decorator)
- Original traceback, easy to debug

When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-retry with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-retry --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
